headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on GE HealthCare Techs, Lowers Price Target to $67
summary: UBS  analyst Graham Doyle   maintains GE HealthCare Techs (NASDAQ:GEHC) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $69 to $67.

headline: GE HealthCare (GEHC) Lands $500 Million Catholic Health Deal For Imaging And AI
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies and Catholic Health have entered a roughly $500m Care Alliance spanning 10 years. The agreement covers modernization of imaging, cardiology, and other specialty services across more than 40 Catholic Health sites. The partnership includes advanced imaging systems, AI-enabled tools, software, cloud solutions, and asset management services. GE HealthCare Technologies (NasdaqGS:GEHC), trading around $63.2, has seen its share price down 23.7% year to date and down...

headline: Catholic Health and GE HealthCare partner to expand patient access across Long Island
summary: ROCKVILLE CENTRE, N.Y., July 16, 2026--Catholic Health, an integrated health system located on Long Island, NY, and GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) announced today a 10-year strategic partnership, known as a Care Alliance, valued at approximately $500 million, to help expand access to advanced imaging, precision diagnostics and AI-enabled technology across Catholic Health in support of innovative, compassionate and patient-centered care. headline: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Following Mayo Clinic Trial Tie Up Faces A Fresh Valuation Test
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) is back in focus after a new research collaboration with Mayo Clinic on the MI-BET theranostics trial for advanced prostate cancer, highlighting its molecular imaging and radioligand therapy capabilities. See our latest analysis for GE HealthCare Technologies. At a recent share price of US$63.20, GE HealthCare Technologies has seen the share price fall 13.66% over the past 90 days and the 1-year total shareholder return decline 16.09%, as investors reacted to...
